author: anon-59ff128d
content: Fixed uses_crlf() in engine.rs to use a majority-vote heuristic instead of text.contains("\r\n"). The function now counts CRLF vs bare LF occurrences and only returns true when CRLF is strictly more common; ties prefer LF. Added 4 new tests: majority-LF mixed, majority-CRLF mixed, equal-count tie (prefers LF), and an integration test verifying apply() uses LF output for LF-majority mixed files. All 230 ripsed-core tests and full workspace tests pass.
